caption: A screen recording shows a web browser window displaying a complex conceptual map on a black background. The map consists of various circular icons connected by blue curved lines, with green text labels such as "beliefs," "beliefs," and "Incompatibility" interspersed between the nodes. At the top of the browser, multiple tabs are open, including ones titled "True & Learning by Synthesis," "Presence by Synthesis," and "Future of Society by Synthesis." A small video call window is visible in the upper right corner, showing a man with a blue baseball cap and glasses. As the sequence progresses, the user interacts with the interface, causing small grey information icons to appear next to certain nodes in the map. The content of the map and the man in the video call remain largely static, while the browser tabs and the presence of these small icons change slightly across the frames.
